articles.title: Apple Passwords Now Auto-Fix Weak Passwords
articles.description: Apple's Passwords app can now automatically update weak and compromised passwords using AI. This feature enhances user security effortlessly.
articles.impact: This feature significantly improves password management.

articles.title: Valve’s Steam Frame VR Setup Tutorial Leaked
articles.description: A leaked video reveals Valve's Steam Frame software and its VR setup tutorial. This could enhance user onboarding for VR experiences.
articles.impact: This leak may boost interest in Valve's VR.

articles.title: Destiny 2's Final Update Arrives June 9
articles.description: Destiny 2 will release its last major update on June 9, featuring significant content. This marks the end of an era for the game.

articles.title: Tim Cook Shares Comedic Video for Final Event
articles.description: Tim Cook posted a humorous video ahead of his last Apple event at WWDC. He will step down as CEO on September 1.
articles.impact: Cook's departure marks a significant leadership change.

articles.title: Nintendo Fined €35 Million Over Joy-Con Defect
articles.description: Nintendo faces a €35 million fine in France for delaying communication about Joy-Con controller defects. The company was aware of the issue since 2018.
articles.impact: This fine highlights consumer protection enforcement.
